docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EID, RONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS DEPT STORES
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
